identity_boundary.allowed_description: A lightweight validation profile that packages one-click owner review evidence for recurring PageLab public page updates.
identity_boundary.forbidden_description: An autonomous worker system, full QA platform, deployment system, visual regression suite, or public go-live authority.

checks.name: Public surface identified
checks.block_if: No public route, page, component, card, preview URL, or production URL is identified.

checks.name: Claim-safe wording
checks.block_if: Copy makes unsupported maturity, proof, production-readiness, automation, certification, or enterprise-grade claims.

checks.name: No private KB or local path leak
checks.block_if: A private local path or private KB path appears in public-facing copy or owner-safe summary fields.

checks.name: No secrets, receipts, telemetry, prompt logs, or internal evidence JSON exposed
checks.block_if: Sensitive receipt, key, token, raw telemetry, prompt log, or internal evidence detail is exposed.

checks.name: No Round 3 execution or success overclaim
checks.block_if: Public copy implies CASE-003 Round 3 execution, completion, success, production readiness, real pilot completion, or proof without authorization.

checks.name: Build/typecheck/lint evidence captured if applicable
checks.block_if: A required technical check failed and the failure is not bounded.

checks.name: Route smoke evidence captured if applicable
checks.block_if: Route smoke failed for a route expected to go live.

checks.name: Deployment or preview URL captured if deployment occurred
checks.block_if: Deployment occurred but no URL or reference is available and public verification depends on it.

checks.name: Public copy distinguishes internal evidence from public claim
checks.block_if: Internal evidence is presented as public proof without boundary.

checks.name: Forbidden terms only appear in boundary or forbidden sections
checks.block_if: Forbidden terms appear as positive public claims.

checks.name: Visual Spot Checker
checks.block_if: The intended entry is not visible where expected after public verification is required.

checks.name: Owner review surface available
checks.block_if: No owner-accessible review surface is available before a go-live decision.

one_click_public_review.purpose: Generate a one-click owner review packet without deploying.

go_live_rule: No go-live readiness recommendation unless the owner can inspect the intended public change through a one-click review artifact. This runner never approves go-live.
